<!--
PR title MUST be Conventional Commits with a LOWERCASE subject, e.g.
  fix(daily): resume pill scrolls with home content
Accepted types: feat fix docs chore refactor test build ci perf style revert
The squash-merge commit takes this title. CI must be green before merge.
-->

## What
<!-- One or two sentences: what this change does. -->

## Why
<!-- The problem / motivation. Link the issue: Closes #NNN -->

## How verified
<!-- Tests run + result, or manual verification. e.g. `swift test --package-path Packages/SudokuKit` → green -->

## Notes
<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, deviations. -->
